tasks.name: Company Research — Mercury
tasks.goal: Research Mercury (mercury.com) and fill in the pending fields in the Company research sheet: funding, headcount, and recent_signal. Use web search if available. Cite sources.

tasks.name: Competitor Analysis — Ramp vs Brex
tasks.goal: Compare Ramp and Brex in the Company research sheet. Fill in their funding, headcount, and recent_signal fields. Note key differences in their market positioning.

tasks.name: Diligence Memo — CardioNova
tasks.goal: Write a 3-paragraph diligence memo for CardioNova in the Diligence memo note. Cover: AI triage product, hospital buyer profile, and key risks (regulatory, adoption, competition).

tasks.name: Workplan Update
tasks.goal: Update the Open questions / workplan note with 3 specific next steps for the Mercury account based on what you know. Each step should have an owner and a timeline.
